summary: This document is a business plan prepared for the UK Endorsed Body Scheme (UKES) visa application. It details the KeepMeCompany AI companion product for seniors, currently in beta with 8 users, outlining market potential and financial projections for the first three years. The text specifically addresses the Innovation, Viability, and Scalability criteria required for visa endorsement.
